tasks.label: probe-api-2
tasks.command: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $h=Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/health' -Method GET; $a=Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/agents' -Method GET; $c=Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/council/start' -Method POST; Write-Output ('HEALTH=' + ($h | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10 -Compress)); Write-Output ('AGENTS=' + ($a | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10 -Compress)); Write-Output ('COUNCIL=' + ($c | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10 -Compress));

tasks.label: probe-api-final
tasks.command: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $healthResp=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/health' -Method GET; $agentsResp=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/agents' -Method GET; $startResp=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/council/start' -Method POST -Body @{question='runtime probe';rounds='1'}; $health=$healthResp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $agents=$agentsResp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $start=$startResp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $primaryModels=@($agents.agents | ForEach-Object { $_.model } | Select-Object -Unique); $agentsWithFallbacks=@($agents.agents | Where-Object { $_.models -and $_.models.Count -gt 1 }); $judgeHasFallbacks=($agents.judge.models -and $agents.judge.models.Count -gt 1); Write-Output ('HEALTH_STATUS=' + $healthResp.StatusCode); Write-Output ('HEALTH_BODY=' + ($health | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10 -Compress)); Write-Output ('AGENTS_STATUS=' + $agentsResp.StatusCode); Write-Output ('PRIMARY_MODELS_UNIQUE=' + $primaryModels.Count); Write-Output ('PRIMARY_MODELS=' + (($primaryModels -join ',') )); Write-Output ('AGENTS_WITH_FALLBACKS=' + $agentsWithFallbacks.Count); Write-Output ('JUDGE_HAS_FALLBACKS=' + $judgeHasFallbacks); Write-Output ('AGENTS_BODY=' + ($agents | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10 -Compress)); Write-Output ('START_STATUS=' + $startResp.StatusCode); Write-Output ('START_HAS_SESSION_ID=' + [bool]$start.session_id); Write-Output ('START_BODY=' + ($start | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10 -Compress));

tasks.label: probe-api-8001-e2e
args: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $base='http://127.0.0.1:8001'; $maxSeconds=480; $intervalSeconds=2; function Out($k,$v){ Write-Output ($k + '=' + $v) }; try { $healthResp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base/api/health" -Method GET; $health = $healthResp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Out 'HEALTH_STATUS' $healthResp.StatusCode; Out 'HEALTH_BODY' (($health | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 20 -Compress)); $agentsResp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base/api/agents" -Method GET; $agents = $agentsResp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Out 'AGENTS_STATUS' $agentsResp.StatusCode; $agentCount = if($agents.agents){ $agents.agents.Count } else { 0 }; Out 'AGENT_COUNT' $agentCount; $agentNames = if($agents.agents){ ($agents.agents | ForEach-Object { $_.name }) -join ',' } else { '' }; Out 'AGENT_NAMES' $agentNames; Out 'AGENTS_BODY' (($agents | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 20 -Compress)); $question='Quick live e2e check: is this council pipeline healthy?'; $startResp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base/api/council/start" -Method POST -Body @{ question=$question; rounds='1' }; $start = $startResp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Out 'START_STATUS' $startResp.StatusCode; Out 'START_BODY' (($start | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 20 -Compress)); if(-not $start.session_id){ throw 'start response missing session_id' }; $sessionId = $start.session_id; Out 'SESSION_ID' $sessionId; $elapsed = 0; $result = $null; while($elapsed -lt $maxSeconds){ Start-Sleep -Seconds $intervalSeconds; $elapsed += $intervalSeconds; try { $resResp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base/api/council/result/$sessionId" -Method GET; $resObj = $resResp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $hasResult = $false; if($null -ne $resObj){ if($resObj.PSObject.Properties.Name -contains 'result'){ if($null -ne $resObj.result){ $hasResult = $true } } elseif($resObj.PSObject.Properties.Name -contains 'status'){ if(($resObj.status -eq 'completed') -or ($resObj.status -eq 'done') -or ($resObj.status -eq 'success')){ $hasResult = $true } } }; Out 'POLL_T' $elapsed; Out 'POLL_STATUS' $resResp.StatusCode; if($hasResult){ $result = $resObj; break } } catch { Out 'POLL_T' $elapsed; Out 'POLL_ERROR' $_.Exception.Message } }; if($null -eq $result){ throw ("timeout after ${maxSeconds}s waiting for result for session_id=$sessionId") }; Out 'RESULT_BODY' (($result | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 40 -Compress)); $verdict = $null; $confidence = $null; $rerun = $null; $delib = $null; if($result.PSObject.Properties.Name -contains 'result'){ $inner = $result.result } else { $inner = $result }; if($null -ne $inner){ if($inner.PSObject.Properties.Name -contains 'verdict'){ $verdict = $inner.verdict }; if($inner.PSObject.Properties.Name -contains 'confidence'){ $confidence = $inner.confidence }; if($inner.PSObject.Properties.Name -contains 'rerun'){ $rerun = $inner.rerun }; if($inner.PSObject.Properties.Name -contains 'deliberation_log'){ $delib = $inner.deliberation_log } }; $preview = ''; if($verdict){ $s=[string]$verdict; $preview = if($s.Length -gt 220){ $s.Substring(0,220) } else { $s } }; Out 'FINAL_VERDICT_PREVIEW' $preview; Out 'FINAL_CONFIDENCE' $confidence; Out 'FINAL_RERUN' $rerun; if($delib){ $models = @(); foreach($item in $delib){ $agent=''; $model=''; if($item.PSObject.Properties.Name -contains 'agent'){ $agent=[string]$item.agent } elseif($item.PSObject.Properties.Name -contains 'name'){ $agent=[string]$item.name }; if($item.PSObject.Properties.Name -contains 'model'){ $model=[string]$item.model } elseif($item.PSObject.Properties.Name -contains 'used_model'){ $model=[string]$item.used_model } elseif($item.PSObject.Properties.Name -contains 'selected_model'){ $model=[string]$item.selected_model }; if($agent -or $model){ $models += ("$agent=>$model") } }; Out 'AGENT_MODELS' ($models -join ';') } else { Out 'AGENT_MODELS' '' }; Out 'FINAL_STATUS' 'SUCCESS' } catch { Out 'FINAL_STATUS' 'ERROR'; Out 'ERROR_REASON' $_.Exception.Message; if($_.ScriptStackTrace){ Out 'ERROR_STACK' $_.ScriptStackTrace }; exit 1 }

tasks.label: probe-api-8001-e2e-v2
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$ErrorActionPreference=\"Stop\"; $base=\"http://127.0.0.1:8001\"; $maxSeconds=480; $intervalSeconds=2; function Out($k,$v){ Write-Output ($k + \"=\" + $v) }; try { $healthResp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri \"$base/api/health\" -Method GET; $health = $healthResp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Out \"HEALTH_STATUS\" $healthResp.StatusCode; Out \"HEALTH_BODY\" (($health | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 20 -Compress)); $agentsResp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri \"$base/api/agents\" -Method GET; $agents = $agentsResp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Out \"AGENTS_STATUS\" $agentsResp.StatusCode; $agentCount = if($agents.agents){ $agents.agents.Count } else { 0 }; Out \"AGENT_COUNT\" $agentCount; $agentNames = if($agents.agents){ ($agents.agents | ForEach-Object { $_.name }) -join \",\" } else { \"\" }; Out \"AGENT_NAMES\" $agentNames; Out \"AGENTS_BODY\" (($agents | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 20 -Compress)); $question=\"Quick live e2e check: is this council pipeline healthy?\"; $startResp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri \"$base/api/council/start\" -Method POST -Body @{ question=$question; rounds=\"1\" }; $start = $startResp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Out \"START_STATUS\" $startResp.StatusCode; Out \"START_BODY\" (($start | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 20 -Compress)); if(-not $start.session_id){ throw \"start response missing session_id\" }; $sessionId = $start.session_id; Out \"SESSION_ID\" $sessionId; $elapsed = 0; $result = $null; while($elapsed -lt $maxSeconds){ Start-Sleep -Seconds $intervalSeconds; $elapsed += $intervalSeconds; try { $resResp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri \"$base/api/council/result/$sessionId\" -Method GET; $resObj = $resResp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $hasResult = $false; if($null -ne $resObj){ if($resObj.PSObject.Properties.Name -contains \"result\"){ if($null -ne $resObj.result){ $hasResult = $true } } elseif($resObj.PSObject.Properties.Name -contains \"status\"){ if(($resObj.status -eq \"completed\") -or ($resObj.status -eq \"done\") -or ($resObj.status -eq \"success\")){ $hasResult = $true } } }; Out \"POLL_T\" $elapsed; Out \"POLL_STATUS\" $resResp.StatusCode; if($hasResult){ $result = $resObj; break } } catch { Out \"POLL_T\" $elapsed; Out \"POLL_ERROR\" $_.Exception.Message } }; if($null -eq $result){ throw (\"timeout after ${maxSeconds}s waiting for result for session_id=$sessionId\") }; Out \"RESULT_BODY\" (($result | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 40 -Compress)); $verdict = $null; $confidence = $null; $rerun = $null; $delib = $null; if($result.PSObject.Properties.Name -contains \"result\"){ $inner = $result.result } else { $inner = $result }; if($null -ne $inner){ if($inner.PSObject.Properties.Name -contains \"verdict\"){ $verdict = $inner.verdict }; if($inner.PSObject.Properties.Name -contains \"confidence\"){ $confidence = $inner.confidence }; if($inner.PSObject.Properties.Name -contains \"rerun\"){ $rerun = $inner.rerun }; if($inner.PSObject.Properties.Name -contains \"deliberation_log\"){ $delib = $inner.deliberation_log } }; $preview = \"\"; if($verdict){ $s=[string]$verdict; $preview = if($s.Length -gt 220){ $s.Substring(0,220) } else { $s } }; Out \"FINAL_VERDICT_PREVIEW\" $preview; Out \"FINAL_CONFIDENCE\" $confidence; Out \"FINAL_RERUN\" $rerun; if($delib){ $models = @(); foreach($item in $delib){ $agent=\"\"; $model=\"\"; if($item.PSObject.Properties.Name -contains \"agent\"){ $agent=[string]$item.agent } elseif($item.PSObject.Properties.Name -contains \"name\"){ $agent=[string]$item.name }; if($item.PSObject.Properties.Name -contains \"model\"){ $model=[string]$item.model } elseif($item.PSObject.Properties.Name -contains \"used_model\"){ $model=[string]$item.used_model } elseif($item.PSObject.Properties.Name -contains \"selected_model\"){ $model=[string]$item.selected_model }; if($agent -or $model){ $models += (\"$agent=>$model\") } }; Out \"AGENT_MODELS\" ($models -join \";\") } else { Out \"AGENT_MODELS\" \"\" }; Out \"FINAL_STATUS\" \"SUCCESS\" } catch { Out \"FINAL_STATUS\" \"ERROR\"; Out \"ERROR_REASON\" $_.Exception.Message; if($_.ScriptStackTrace){ Out \"ERROR_STACK\" $_.ScriptStackTrace }; exit 1 }"

tasks.label: probe-api-8001-inline
tasks.command: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $base='http://127.0.0.1:8001'; $healthResp=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base/api/health" -Method GET; $agentsResp=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base/api/agents" -Method GET; $question='Short runtime probe?'; $startResp=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base/api/council/start" -Method POST -Body @{question=$question;rounds='1'}; $health=$healthResp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $agents=$agentsResp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $start=$startResp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output ('HEALTH_STATUS=' + $healthResp.StatusCode); Write-Output ('HEALTH_BODY=' + ($health | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 20 -Compress)); Write-Output ('AGENTS_STATUS=' + $agentsResp.StatusCode); Write-Output ('AGENTS_BODY=' + ($agents | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 20 -Compress)); Write-Output ('START_STATUS=' + $startResp.StatusCode); Write-Output ('START_BODY=' + ($start | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 20 -Compress)); if(-not $start.session_id){ throw 'start response missing session_id' }; $sid=$start.session_id; Write-Output ('SESSION_ID=' + $sid); $deadline=(Get-Date).AddMinutes(8); $resultObj=$null; while((Get-Date) -lt $deadline){ Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try { $resResp=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base/api/council/result/$sid" -Method GET; $res=$resResp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output ('POLL_STATUS=' + $resResp.StatusCode); if($res.result){ $resultObj=$res; break } if($res.status -in @('completed','done','success')){ $resultObj=$res; break } } catch { Write-Output ('POLL_ERROR=' + $_.Exception.Message) } }; if(-not $resultObj){ throw ('timeout after 8 minutes waiting for session_id=' + $sid) }; Write-Output ('RESULT_BODY=' + ($resultObj | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 50 -Compress)); $inner=if($resultObj.result){$resultObj.result}else{$resultObj}; $verdict=$inner.verdict; $confidence=$inner.confidence; $rerun=$inner.rerun; $models=''; if($inner.deliberation_log){ $pairs=@(); foreach($d in $inner.deliberation_log){ $an=''; if($d.agent){$an=$d.agent}elseif($d.name){$an=$d.name}; $mn=''; if($d.model){$mn=$d.model}elseif($d.used_model){$mn=$d.used_model}elseif($d.selected_model){$mn=$d.selected_model}; if($an -or $mn){$pairs += ($an + '=>' + $mn)} }; $models=($pairs -join ';') }; $preview=''; if($verdict){ $sv=[string]$verdict; if($sv.Length -gt 240){$preview=$sv.Substring(0,240)}else{$preview=$sv}}; Write-Output ('FINAL_VERDICT_PREVIEW=' + $preview); Write-Output ('FINAL_CONFIDENCE=' + $confidence); Write-Output ('FINAL_RERUN=' + $rerun); Write-Output ('AGENT_MODELS=' + $models); Write-Output 'FINAL_STATUS=SUCCESS'

tasks.label: live-e2e-probe-8001-6m
tasks.command: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $base='http://127.0.0.1:8001'; $healthResp=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base/api/health" -Method GET; $agentsResp=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base/api/agents" -Method GET; $question='Short runtime probe?'; $startResp=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base/api/council/start" -Method POST -Body @{question=$question;rounds='1'}; $health=$healthResp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $agents=$agentsResp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $start=$startResp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output ('HEALTH_STATUS=' + $healthResp.StatusCode); Write-Output ('HEALTH_BODY=' + ($health | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 20 -Compress)); Write-Output ('AGENTS_STATUS=' + $agentsResp.StatusCode); Write-Output ('AGENTS_BODY=' + ($agents | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 20 -Compress)); Write-Output ('START_STATUS=' + $startResp.StatusCode); Write-Output ('START_BODY=' + ($start | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 20 -Compress)); if(-not $start.session_id){ throw 'start response missing session_id' }; $sid=$start.session_id; Write-Output ('SESSION_ID=' + $sid); $deadline=(Get-Date).AddMinutes(6); $resultObj=$null; while((Get-Date) -lt $deadline){ Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try { $resResp=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base/api/council/result/$sid" -Method GET; $res=$resResp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output ('POLL_STATUS=' + $resResp.StatusCode); if($res.result){ $resultObj=$res; break } if($res.status -in @('completed','done','success','complete')){ $resultObj=$res; break } } catch { Write-Output ('POLL_ERROR=' + $_.Exception.Message) } }; if(-not $resultObj){ throw ('timeout after 6 minutes waiting for session_id=' + $sid) }; Write-Output ('RESULT_BODY=' + ($resultObj | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 50 -Compress)); $inner=if($resultObj.result){$resultObj.result}else{$resultObj}; $verdict=$inner.verdict; $confidence=$inner.confidence; $rerun=$inner.rerun; $models=''; if($inner.deliberation_log){ $pairs=@(); foreach($d in $inner.deliberation_log){ $an=''; if($d.agent){$an=$d.agent}elseif($d.name){$an=$d.name}; $mn=''; if($d.model){$mn=$d.model}elseif($d.used_model){$mn=$d.used_model}elseif($d.selected_model){$mn=$d.selected_model}; if($an -or $mn){ $pairs += ($an + '=>' + $mn)} }; $models=($pairs -join ';') }; $preview=''; if($verdict){ $sv=[string]$verdict; if($sv.Length -gt 240){$preview=$sv.Substring(0,240)}else{$preview=$sv}}; $fallback=$false; if($verdict -match 'could not produce a full verdict|all configured judge models failed|fallback'){ $fallback=$true }; Write-Output ('FINAL_VERDICT_PREVIEW=' + $preview); Write-Output ('FINAL_CONFIDENCE=' + $confidence); Write-Output ('FINAL_RERUN=' + $rerun); Write-Output ('FALLBACK_FAILURE_WORDING=' + $fallback); Write-Output ('AGENT_MODELS=' + $models); Write-Output 'FINAL_STATUS=SUCCESS'

Write-Output ('FINAL_RERUN=' + $rerun); Write-Output ('FALLBACK_FAILURE_WORDING=' + $fallback); Write-Output ('AGENT_MODELS=' + $models); Write-Output 'FINAL_STATUS=SUCCESS'

tasks.label: probe-api-8003-e2e-live
args: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $base='http://127.0.0.1:8003'; $healthResp=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base/api/health" -Method GET; $agentsResp=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base/api/agents" -Method GET;
